g.title: instr-pwm
g.text: Instrument-light PWM dimmer module ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rtmr-ign
g.text: Cabin IGNITION bus (RTMR, bussed) ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rly-wlow
g.text: Wiper LOW + self-park relay ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rly-whigh
g.text: Wiper HIGH relay ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: fan-resistor
g.text: Heater-fan PWM / resistor module (low speed, optional) ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)
